Overview  Package  Class   Use  Tree  Deprecated  Index  Help 
 PREV   NEXT FRAMES    NO FRAMES    

Uses of Interface
javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable

Packages that use Joinable
javax.media.mscontrol.join An application joins media objects to establish media streams between them. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup A MediaGroup is mostly a player/recorder. 
javax.media.mscontrol.mixer A MediaMixer has the capacity to combine the media streams coming from multiple sources, into a single media stream. 
javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection NetworkConnections manage a network termination point, using RTP for an IP network. 
javax.media.mscontrol.vxml Capabilities to control VoiceXML dialogs that are delegated to the Media Server. 
 

Uses of Joinable in javax.media.mscontrol.join
 

Subinterfaces of Joinable in javax.media.mscontrol.join
 interface JoinableContainer
          A Joinable object that contains multiple streams.
 interface JoinableDialog
          Implements a high level of abstraction of media interaction, for example a voicexml script interpreter.
 interface JoinableStream
          A JoinableStream represents a media stream channel (or port), of a given type: audio, video, etc.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.join that return Joinable
 Joinable[] JoinableDialog.getJoinables()
           
 Joinable[] Joinable.getJoinees()
           
 Joinable[] Joinable.getJoinees(Joinable.Direction direction)
           
 Joinable JoinEvent.getOtherJoinable()
          Return a reference on the "other" Joinable, that was the second argument of joinInitiate(javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable.Direction, Joinable, java.io.Serializable)
 Joinable JoinEvent.getThisJoinable()
          Return a reference to the object on which joinInitiate was called.
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.join with parameters of type Joinable
 void Joinable.join(Joinable.Direction direction, Joinable other)
          Establish a media stream between this object and other.
 void Joinable.joinInitiate(Joinable.Direction direction, Joinable other, java.io.Serializable context)
          Initiates the same action as join(javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable.Direction, Joinable), but returns immediately, without waiting for the join completion (asynchronous operation).
 void Joinable.unjoin(Joinable other)
          Disconnect any media streams flowing between this object and other's.
 void Joinable.unjoinInitiate(Joinable other, java.io.Serializable context)
          Asynchronous version of unjoin.
 

Uses of Joinable in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 

Subinterfaces of Joinable in javax.media.mscontrol.mediagroup
 interface MediaGroup
          Adapter class which provides the asynchronous access to media containers (files) and signals (DMTF's).
 

Uses of Joinable in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 

Subinterfaces of Joinable in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer
 interface MediaMixer
          This class is required when the application needs to mix (or add, or sum) multiple media streams into a single one.
 interface MixerAdapter
          A MixerAdapter is the materialization of a "Mixer port".
 

Methods in javax.media.mscontrol.mixer that return Joinable
 Joinable[] MixerEvent.getActiveInputs()
          Each entry in the returned array is a reference on a media object (usually a NetworkConnection) that is actively participating to the mix.
 

Uses of Joinable in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 

Subinterfaces of Joinable in javax.media.mscontrol.networkconnection
 interface NetworkConnection
          A NetworkConnection is a JoinableContainer that drives network media ports.
 

Uses of Joinable in javax.media.mscontrol.vxml
 

Subinterfaces of Joinable in javax.media.mscontrol.vxml
 interface VxmlDialog
          The interface to delegate the execution of a given vxml script..
